# Axirova Technology — AI & Digital Transformation Company (UAE)

## Company

Axirova Technology is a UAE-based software and AI company that builds intelligent digital solutions for businesses across the GCC (Gulf Cooperation Council) region. Founded by Ahmed Eltyeb Khalifa, Axirova specialises in AI-powered applications, business automation, custom SaaS platforms, mobile app development, and enterprise digital transformation.

Website: https://axirova.ae
Location: United Arab Emirates
Email: info@axirova.ae
Phone: +971 52 930 7250

## What Axirova Does

Axirova builds end-to-end technology solutions including:

- Custom iOS and Android mobile applications (Flutter, React Native)
- AI assistants, computer vision systems, and predictive analytics
- Business process automation and workflow optimisation
- Multi-tenant SaaS platforms and cloud infrastructure
- ERP, CRM, and POS systems for GCC businesses
- Arabic-first UX design and localised digital products for the Gulf market
- Enterprise systems for healthcare, F&B, real estate, retail, and government sectors

## Core Products

1. PharmaX — Cloud-based pharmacy management system (inventory, billing, prescriptions, multi-branch)
2. Restaurant Insight Hub — Operations, orders, kitchen management, and analytics for restaurants
3. Real Estate Hub — Property listings, client management, and deal pipeline tracking
4. AI Automation Hub — Centralised platform for deploying AI agents and automating workflows
5. AXIROVA ERP Suite — Integrated ERP covering inventory, finance, HR, and procurement

## Industries Served

Healthcare, Food & Beverage, Real Estate, Retail & Commerce, Professional Services, Government & Public Sector

## Technology Stack

Frontend: Flutter, React Native, React
Backend: Django, Laravel, Node.js
AI: OpenAI, LangChain, Computer Vision, Audio AI
Cloud: AWS, GCP, Firebase
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
Infrastructure: Docker, REST APIs, CI/CD
